web-console-next · demo gallery
Mock data. Screenshots captured here for the task verifier.

precondition_failed — limit_reached

You've hit your project limit

limit reached

precondition_failed · resource: project

Your current plan allows 3 project · you're at 3. Upgrade your plan to create more, or talk to us about a custom tier.

Usage3 / 3

precondition_failed — disabled

Custom domain are disabled on your plan

disabled

precondition_failed · resource: custom domain

Your organization doesn't currently have access to custom domain. Contact your account team to enable this entitlement.

precondition_failed — not_configured

Billing isn't configured yet

not configured

precondition_failed · resource: entitlement

We can't validate your entitlement entitlement because billing hasn't been set up for this organization. Finish setup in the Billing tab, then try again.

precondition_failed — malformed_limit (defensive)

Billing provider returned an unexpected limit

malformed limit

precondition_failed · resource: invitation

We received a malformed entitlement value from your billing provider. This is a configuration issue on our side — our team has been notified. Please retry, or contact support with the request ID below.
